creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
/boot.config:
-h -S115200

/boot/loader.conf:
boot_multicons="NO"
boot_serial="YES"
comconsole_speed="115200"
console="comconsole"

When selecting the loader prompt, typing commands works, but the character echoed is most of the time one of /, \, | instead of the typed character.
